zh.lifeSummary: 當Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief於1324年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾可納達爾時，他的父親John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean44歲，母親Cumming25歲。他於大約1367年5月13日與Mary MacDonald在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1405年享年82歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief于1324年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾可納達爾时，他的父亲John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean44岁，母亲Cumming25岁。他于大约1367年5月13日与Mary MacDonald在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1405年享年82岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾德華爾特 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: MacLean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLean
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Eáin, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) John’. Compare Irish McAloon and McGlone .

History: This is the name of a major Scottish clan traditionally associated with the island of Mull, which claims descent from Gille Eáin na Tuaidh (‘Gillean of the Battleaxe’), who lived in the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Lachlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Scottish Gaelic Lachlann (earlier Lochlann), said to refer originally to a migrant from Norway, the ‘land of the lochs’. The name was traditionally used only in families with some Highlands connection and still retains a very Scottish flavour. However, it has now acquired wide popular appeal, especially in Australia and New Zealand.

variants.name: Lachlann
meanings: From Scottish Gaelic Lachlann (earlier Lochlann), said to refer originally to a migrant from Norway, the ‘land of the lochs’. The name was traditionally used only in families with some Highlands connection and still retains a very Scottish flavour. However, it has now acquired wide popular appeal, especially in Australia and New Zealand.

en.lifeSummary: When Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief was born in 1324, in Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland, his father, John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean, was 44 and his mother, Cumming, was 25. He married Mary MacDonald about 13 May 1367, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1405, at the age of 82, and was buried in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief est né en 1324, à Knapdale, Argyll, Écosse, son père, John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Cumming, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Mary MacDonald environ 13 mai 1367, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1405, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Duart Castle, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief 1324 in Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean 44 und seine Mutter Cumming 25. Er hat um 13. Mai 1367 in Argyll, Scotland Mary MacDonald geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1405 im Alter von 82 Jahren und wurde in Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief è nato il nel 1324 nel Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Cumming, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Mary MacDonald circa 13 maggio 1367, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1405, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chiefが1324年にスコットランドアルグイルナプダルで生まれた時，父John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLeanは44歳，母Cummingは25歳であった。約1367年5月13日にスコットランドアルグイルでMary MacDonaldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1405年に82歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルダアルト カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.Duart Castle, Argyll and Bute, Scotland,: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 단아르트 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief(이)가 1324년 스컷랜드 아그이 냅데일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Cumming(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1367년 5월 13일 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Mary MacDonald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1405년 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 단아르트 카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief nasceu em 1324, em Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Cumming, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary MacDonald aproximadamente 13 de maio de 1367, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1405, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.Duart Castle, Argyll and Bute, Scotland,: дуарт кастл, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lachlan Lubanach MacGilean MacLean 5th. Clan Chief родился в 1324 г. в местности напдеил, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Cumming, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary MacDonald около 13 мая 1367 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1405 г. в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности дуарт кастл, аргилл, Шотландия.

Clan Chief nació en 1324, en Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, John - Iain Dubh mac Gilliemore MacLean 1st of Duart, 4th of Clan MacLean, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Cumming, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Mary MacDonald aproximadamente 13 de mayo de 1367, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1405, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland.
